A

add(T) - Method in class MyPriorityQueue.MinHeap
Adds an element to the min heap.
add(T) - Method in interface MyPriorityQueue.MyPriorityQueue
Adds an element to the priority queue.
addTask(int) - Method in class MyTaskManager.TaskManager
Adds a new task for the specified user.

C

compareTo(MyTask) - Method in class MyTaskManager.MyTask
Compares this task with another task for ordering.

E

executeTasks() - Method in class MyTaskManager.TaskManager
Executes all tasks in the priority queue.

G

getID() - Method in class MyTaskManager.MyUser
Gets the ID of the user.
getPriority() - Method in class MyTaskManager.MyUser
Gets the priority of the user.

I

isEmpty() - Method in class MyPriorityQueue.MinHeap
Checks if the heap is empty.
isEmpty() - Method in interface MyPriorityQueue.MyPriorityQueue
Checks if the priority queue is empty.

L

loadUserConfig(String) - Method in class MyTaskManager.TaskManager
Loads user configuration from the specified file.

M

The entry point of the application.
Main - package Main
 
Main - Class in Main
Main class for the Task Scheduling application.
Main() - Constructor for class Main.Main
 
MinHeap<T extends java.lang.Comparable<T>> - Class in MyPriorityQueue
A generic min heap implementation for the MyPriorityQueue interface.
MinHeap() - Constructor for class MyPriorityQueue.MinHeap
Constructs an empty min heap.
MyPriorityQueue - package MyPriorityQueue
 
MyPriorityQueue<T extends java.lang.Comparable<T>> - Interface in MyPriorityQueue
Interface for a priority queue implementation.
MyTask - Class in MyTaskManager
Represents a task in the task management system.
MyTask(MyUser, Integer) - Constructor for class MyTaskManager.MyTask
Constructs a new task with the specified user and ID.
MyTaskManager - package MyTaskManager
 
MyUser - Class in MyTaskManager
Represents a user in the task management system.
MyUser(Integer, Integer) - Constructor for class MyTaskManager.MyUser
Constructs a new user with the specified ID and priority.

P

poll() - Method in class MyPriorityQueue.MinHeap
Removes and returns the minimum element from the heap.
poll() - Method in interface MyPriorityQueue.MyPriorityQueue
Removes and returns the highest priority element from the queue.

T

TaskManager - Class in MyTaskManager
Manages tasks in the system by handling users and scheduling tasks.
TaskManager() - Constructor for class MyTaskManager.TaskManager
Constructs a new TaskManager and initializes the necessary data structures.
toString() - Method in class MyTaskManager.MyTask
Returns a string representation of the task.
